title: AN ACT TRANSFERRING BARRIO KILING IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PARACALES, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF POTIA, SAME PROVINCE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 619 / 65 OG No. 3, 486 (January 20, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4763, June 18, 1966 ]

AN ACT TRANSFERRING BARRIO KILING IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PARACALES, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF POTIA, SAME PROVINCE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Barrio Kiling in the Municipality of Paracales, Mountain Province, is hereby transferred to the Municipality of Potia, same province.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1966.
